raw_title: Spatiotemporal Unfixing, Image-Flow & Palinode in Photography of the Ukraine War
title_en: Spatiotemporal Unfixing, Image-Flow & Palinode in Photography of the Ukraine War
title_zh: 乌克兰战争摄影中的时空解固、图像流与反悔诗
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了乌克兰战争摄影如何打破传统的时间和空间限制，分析图像如何流动传播，以及摄影作品可能出现的自我否定或修正现象。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how photography of the Ukraine War challenges conventional time and space constraints, analyzes how images circulate, and explores instances of self-contradiction or revision in photographic narratives.
research_direction_zh: 研究视觉媒体在当代冲突报道中的演变，特别是摄影如何反映和塑造战争叙事的时间性、空间性和流动性。
research_direction_en: Investigating the evolution of visual media in contemporary conflict reporting, particularly how photography reflects and shapes the temporality, spatiality, and fluidity of war narratives.
